name: askk-local-ai
description: Source for assets/local_ai.js (main-thread IIFE, window.AskkLocalAI) and assets/local_ai_worker.js (module Web Worker running transformers.js v4: Whisper ASR + Gemma 4 ONNX text generation, WebGPU when available). Edit entry.js / worker.js, then `bun install && bun run build` and commit the rebuilt assets.

scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:worker
